meta.title: CosmoRemote
meta.description: Control your Claude Code and Codex sessions from your phone with real-time streaming and remote relay.

hero.title: CosmoRemote
hero.subtitle: Run Claude Code & Codex from your phone
hero.description: Install with one command, pair by QR, and watch the stream token by token. Your sessions and projects stay with you wherever you go.
hero.note: App not launched yet. iPhone, iPad, and Android are marked Coming Soon.

features.title: Built for remote coding without losing focus
features.description: From local pairing to remote relay, you switch contexts fast and your history stays intact.

items.title: One-command install
items.description: Install the bridge daemon via brew, winget, or curl and be up in seconds.

items.title: cosmoremote start
items.description: Detects Claude Code and Codex, boots a local WebSocket, and prints the pairing QR in the terminal.

items.title: QR pairing
items.description: Scan once to connect to the local IP with an authenticated token.

items.title: CLI selector
items.description: Choose Claude Code or Codex per session before sending commands.

items.title: Working directory selector
items.description: Save projects under friendly names and swap context with a tap.

items.title: Real-time streaming
items.description: Token-by-token output with auto-scroll and no polling.

items.title: Copy output
items.description: Copy the full session or a single code block in one tap.

items.title: Connection status
items.description: Clear badges for local, remote, and disconnected while you work.

screenshots.title: Streaming, pairing, and session control
screenshots.description: A quick tour through the main screens: live streaming, session list, and the QR pairing flow.

items.title: Live streaming
items.caption: Token-by-token output with connection status and project path.

items.title: Session list
items.caption: Switch between active, remote, and offline sessions in one timeline.

items.title: QR pairing
items.caption: Fast local connection with encrypted token handoff.

pricing.title: Free to start, with one simple Pro plan
pricing.description: Fully transparent before launch: Free covers the base workflow, Pro unlocks unlimited scale.
pricing.monthlyDescription: Pay month to month and cancel anytime. No lock-in, no surprises.
pricing.yearlyDescription: Pay once for the whole year and get the same Pro features for less.
pricing.yearlyComparisonTemplate: {monthlyTotal} if billed monthly vs {yearly} on the annual plan.

downloads.title: Platform rollout status
downloads.description: Store links aren't live yet, so every platform stays clearly marked Coming Soon.

cards.title: iPhone
cards.note: Remote control, streaming output, and history access on your phone.

cards.title: iPad
cards.note: More room for sessions, project switching, and copy workflows.

cards.title: Android
cards.note: Same local bridge pairing and relay support for cross-device continuity.

faq.title: Straight answers before launch
faq.description: No inflated metrics, no fake store links. Just the details that matter.

questions.question: Is CosmoRemote live yet?
questions.answer: Not yet. iPhone, iPad, and Android are still pre-launch and marked Coming Soon until the stores are live.

questions.question: How does local pairing work?
questions.answer: Run cosmoremote start, scan the QR, and the app connects to the local bridge over WebSocket.

questions.question: Can I switch between Claude Code and Codex?
questions.answer: Yes. You pick the CLI per session before sending commands.

questions.question: What's included in Free?
questions.answer: Everything you need day to day: install, pairing, streaming, history, and a daily limit.

questions.question: What does Pro unlock?
questions.answer: Parallel sessions, unlimited messages per day, multiple Macs, and restore purchases.

questions.question: Why pick yearly?
questions.answer: Yearly ({{yearly_price}}) saves {{yearly_savings}} compared with paying {{monthly_price}} every month for 12 months.

footer.tagline: Manage your Codex and Claude Code sessions with confidence and clarity.

legal.honesty: Pre-launch page. No fake installs, ratings, or reviews.
